object_a.description: table lamp with white shade on left end table
object_a.long_form_open_description: Traditional table lamp with a white fabric shade and a light-colored base, providing soft illumination; sits on the left end table next to the sofa and above a potted plant.

object_b.label: lamp
object_b.long_form_open_description: Traditional table lamp with an off-white fabric shade and a decorative base (likely ceramic or metal). The lamp is on and provides warm local illumination; the shade shows soft warm glow and is the tallest object on the console table.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Sits on top of the center console table, partially overlapping the edge of the partition wall in the image.
